# harness_fme_environment_segment_keys (Resource)

Replace keys for a classic segment in an environment (`replace=true` semantics). Import id format: `org_id/project_id/environment_id/segment_name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) Split environment ID.
- `keys` (Set of String) Segment keys (full replace on each apply).
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.
- `segment_name` (String) Classic segment name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
